original_request:
Integrate Phase 6 evidence quality features (PaperQualityScorer, RefutationSearchTool,
LimitationsExtractor) into GenerationAgent and ReflectionAgent.

GenerationAgent should:
- Score and rank papers before including in context
- Include quality labels (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) in LLM prompts
- Extract and include limitations from papers in context
- Filter out low-quality/retracted sources

ReflectionAgent should:
- Search for contradictory evidence for each hypothesis
- Check retraction status of supporting citations
- Evaluate hypotheses against known limitations from literature
- Include counter-evidence in reflection context
